condition:
Start with the main base as the reference body: overall bounding length 0.75, width 0.364251, and height 0.080711, with the main extrusion depth 0.0807. Use an upper-side solid base footprint spanning 0.75 by 0.3643 with zero left, right, front, and back edge offsets; keep the arc-based rounded outline and include the inner slot-like opening as a through void in the base rather than filling it. Add the base circular through opening on the base plane with its axis 0.4987 from the left edge and 0.1821 from the front edge, radius 0.0396.

Create the coaxial round stepped stack as solid added material. The lower circular collar has radius 0.1104, centered 0.1865 from the left edge and 0.1821 from the front edge, with a 0.220812 by 0.220812 footprint located 0.0761 from the left edge, 0.4531 from the right edge, 0.0717 from the front edge, and 0.0718 from the back edge; its own height above the base top is 0.0914. On the same axis, add the smaller solid cylinder with radius 0.0563 and footprint 0.1126 by 0.1126, offset 0.1302 from the left edge, 0.5072 from the right edge, 0.1258 from the front edge, and 0.1259 from the back edge; this upper post has its own height 0.2893 above the collar shoulder. Treat both circular profiles as individual solid cylinders, not as rectangular pads, and do not make the upper post hollow.

Add the raised rounded solid region on the right side of the base with a bounding footprint of 0.4584 by 0.3356, offset 0.2916 from the left edge, 0 from the right edge, 0.0144 from the front edge, and 0.0143 from the back edge. This rounded region is a solid upper-side continuation above the main base, with its own stepped height 0.0411 above the base top, and it includes the circular profile on its plane centered 0.4987 from the left edge and 0.1822 from the front edge with radius 0.0396. Add the rectangular solid rib or tab within that rounded footprint, sharing the right edge, with footprint 0.182741 by 0.094416, offsets 0.5673 from the left edge, 0 from the right edge, 0.1349 from the front edge, and 0.135 from the back edge. This rectangular raised feature has its own height 0.0305 above the rounded shoulder, so it is a shallow added tier rather than a through cut.
